We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer to join our product team.

Requirements:
- Strong React and TypeScript expertise
- Experience with component architecture and design systems
- Accessibility knowledge: WCAG 2.1, inclusive design, screen reader support
- Information architecture and user-centered interface design
- Quality assurance and automated testing practices
- Familiarity with Figma and Storybook
- Remote / hybrid work available

We value ownership and cross-functional collaboration. Our team works closely with product and design. User-centric development is at our core.

We offer a full-time position in an agile environment.
